title: Duration
subtitle: A container for a duration of time.

members.description: Returns a new Duration of the two added.
Add aDuration to the receiver. Returns self.
Returns a new Duration of the two subtracted.
Subtract aDuration to the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: asNumber
members.description:
Returns a number representation of the receiver.
    (where 1 is equal to one second)

members.name: asString
members.description:
Returns a string representation of the receiver. The formatString argument is optional. If present, the returned string will be formatted according to ANSI C date formating rules. 

 %y years without century as two-digit
    decimal number (00-99) %Y year with century as four-digit decimal number

    %d days
    %H hour as two-digit 24-hour clock decimal integer (00-23)
    %M minute as a two-digit decimal integer (00-59)
    %S second as a two-digit decimal integer (00-59)

    The default format is "%Y %d %H:%M:%S".

members.name: days
members.description: Returns a number containing the day of the month of the receiver.

members.name: fromNumber
members.description:
Sets the receiver to the Duration specified by
    aNumber(same format number as returned by Duration asNumber). Returns self.

members.name: hours
members.description: Returns a number containing the hour of the day(0-23) of the receiver.

members.name: minutes
members.description: Returns a number containing the minute of the hour(0-59) of the receiver.

members.name: seconds
members.description:
Returns a number containing the seconds of the minute(0-59) of the receiver.
    This number may contain fractions of seconds.

members.name: setDays
members.description: Sets the day of the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: setHours
members.description: Sets the hour of the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: setMinutes
members.description: Sets the minute of the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: setSeconds
members.description: Sets the second of the receiver. Return self.

members.name: setYears
members.description: Sets the year of the receiver. Returns self.

members.name: years
members.description: Returns a number containing the year of the receiver.
